title: The Battle for the Baratie Escalates
description: On pages 5–8, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: He kicked away that weird-ass ship!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You trying to kill your own side!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did your brains become boiled into stew, you retard!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You almost lost 2 powerful fighters, you spaghetti-head!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Powerful? Ha! Even if you hold weapons, a cook's still a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So why don'cha SCRAM back into some other kitchen on land!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
